mapper.select: select sensor_id from sensor_derive1 group by sensor_id
select start_time from sensor_derive1 where sensor_id = #{sensorId} group by start_time
select end_time from sensor_derive1 where sensor_id = #{sensorId} group by end_time
select metric_name from sensor_derive1 group by metric_name
select obs_timestamp from sensor_data_float where sensor_id = #{sensorId} group by obs_timestamp

select sensor_id, metric_name, max(metric_value) as max_value, min(metric_value) as min_value, avg(metric_value) as avg_value, #{startTime} as start_time, #{endTime} as end_time, count(*) as value_number from sensor_data_float where obs_timestamp between #{startTime} and #{endTime} and sensor_id = #{sensorId} group by sensor_id, metric_name;
